rows.label: qev095204_MSG0001
rows.name:
There is an 83.5 percent likelihood
that the Growth will attempt to
terminate us for our betrayal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095204_MSG0002
rows.name:
As an ally, I ask your aid in the
case of such an event. I fear we lack
the means to fight them ourselves.[ST:wait ]
